ideation: This animation sequence mimics the action of rewinding, suggesting a backward motion. The right arm will primarily perform the 'rewinding' gesture, while the left arm provides balance and visual contrast.  Each frame represents a distinct stage of the gesture. Frame 1: Both arms rest loosely at the sides. Frame 2: The right arm moves backward, as if pushing something behind. Frame 3: The right arm moves slightly upward and to the side, emphasizing the backward motion. Frame 4: The right arm returns to a neutral position, completing the rewind gesture. Frame 5: Both arms return to their resting position. The left arm's movements are subtle, maintaining balance and visual coherence. I'll make use of joint1 to alter the position of the arms and joint2 to pitch them up or down, and avoid any jerky, unnatural movements.

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed at the sides
right arm pushes back, starting the rewind
the rewind motion continues, sweeping upward
the right arm completes the rewind gesture
both arms return to a resting state
